notes: ChatBridge parent traces now emit runtime-target and smoke-support metadata/tags alongside the existing family contract.
The manual smoke helper returns an explicit trace handoff for supported runs and reason-coded non-traceable outcomes for legacy or unavailable paths.
The current live-seed and preset-session corpus is now scriptably inspectable through a pure snapshot helper without renderer-storage access.
focusedGreenCommand: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && pnpm exec vitest run test/integration/chatbridge/scenarios/scenario-tracing.test.ts src/renderer/dev/chatbridgeManualSmoke.test.ts src/renderer/components/dev/ChatBridgeSeedLab.test.tsx src/shared/chatbridge/live-seeds.test.ts src/renderer/packages/initial_data.test.ts
